backstory.original: Ellywick Tumblestrum has created music of such stirring quality that she was once invited to the Feywild where she played for the Summer Queen and the Queen of Air and Darkness. So moved were the two queens that they gifted the bard with her instrument, Morningmist. Tumblestrum's affinity for the Feywild brought her and her frog companion, Groak, to the Witchlight Carnival, where she spins tales and sings songs about the Plane of Faerie.
backstory.display: 艾利薇·乱弦曾创作出相当令人感动的音乐，以至于曾经受邀前往妖精荒野，还为夏日女王和空气与黑暗女王进行过演奏。两位女王都十分感动，赐给这位吟游诗人一件乐器--晨雾。乱弦与妖精荒野的关系让她和她的青蛙伙伴格罗阿克来到了女巫之光嘉年华，在这里，她会传颂关于妖精位面的传说与歌谣。

description.original: Ellywick strums her guitar sending out musical energy to attack up to 3 random enemies.
description.display: 艾利薇弹奏吉他，发出音乐能量，攻击最多 3 个随机敌人。

longDescription.original: Ellywick strums her guitar sending out musical energy to attack up to 3 random enemies.
longDescription.display: 艾利薇弹奏吉他，发出音乐能量，攻击最多 3 个随机敌人。

description.original: Ellywick discards her current hand and six feywild creatures run around damaging enemies.
description.display: 艾利薇丢弃她当前的手牌，六只来自妖精荒野的生物四处奔跑，对敌人造成伤害。

longDescription.original: Ellywick discards her current hand and six feywild creatures run to Ellywick, damaging enemies as they come, and then again as they run away.
longDescription.display: 艾利薇丢弃她当前的手牌，六只来自妖精荒野的生物跑向艾利薇，并对沿途的敌人造成伤害，然后跑开，再次对沿途的敌人造成伤害。

description.original: Ellywick buffs the damage of Champions in the column behind them, this buff is increased by their Knight stacks.
description.display: 艾利薇为处于她后方一列的勇士提供伤害增益，此效果会根据骑士堆叠层数而增加。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of Champions in the column behind her by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)为处于她后方一列的勇士提高 $(amount)% 伤害。

tipText.original: Ellywick increases the damage of Champions in the column behind her, with further buffs depending on what cards she pulls from her Deck of Many Things!
tipText.display: 艾利薇会提高处于她后列勇士的伤害，并根据她从万象无常牌中抽取的卡牌提供进一步的增益！

description.desc: Ellywick draws a random card from the Deck of Many Things after every 25th enemy kill or after 60 seconds, whichever comes first. She can hold up to 5 cards at once and most duplicate card effects stack multiplicatively. Cards are discarded when she uses her ultimate ability, Call Of The Feywild.

effect_keys.dev_note: The Fates card buffs all other cards pre-stack, so all other cards have their amount_expr use this upgrade_amount as well

effect_keys.total_title: Total Monster Speed and Damage Bonus

description.desc: 每击杀 25 个敌人或每 60 秒（以先满足条件者为准），艾利薇会从万象无常牌中随机抽一张卡牌。她一次最多可以抽 5 张卡牌，大多数重复的卡牌效果以乘算方式堆叠。当她使用杀招技能“妖精荒野的呼唤”时，卡牌会被丢弃。

effect_keys.dev_note: The Fates card buffs all other cards pre-stack, so all other cards have their amount_expr use this upgrade_amount as well

effect_keys.total_title: 怪物速度与伤害总加成

tipText.original: Ellywick pulls a card from her Deck of Many Things for every 25 enemies defeated or after 60 seconds, changing her buffs for each card drawn.
tipText.display: 艾利薇每击倒 25 名敌人或每隔 60 秒从她的万象无常牌中抽取一张卡牌，每抽取一张牌便改变她的增益。

description.desc: Ellywick unlocks her ultimate ability and, when she uses it, discards her current hand of cards. There is an instant effect based on each card discarded:^^Knight - All enemies currently spawned take 500% more damage from all attacks (stacks multiplicatively)^Moon - Instantly drop 10% of the gold from all currently spawned enemies (stacks multiplicatively)^Fates - Champions gain temporary hit points for 50% of their max health (stacks additively)^Flames - All currently spawned enemies move 50% slower and deal 50% less damage (stacks multiplicatively)^Gems - The next X bosses you fight have their max health reduced by 50% (X = # of cards)

艾利薇解锁她的杀招技能，当她使用杀招时，她会丢弃她当前的手牌。每张被丢弃的卡牌都有即时效果：^^骑士 - 所有当前刷新的敌人受到的所有攻击伤害增加 500%（以乘算方式堆叠）^月亮 - 所有当前刷新的敌人立即掉落 10% 金币（以乘算方式堆叠）^命运 - 勇士们获得相当于其最大生命值 50% 的临时生命值（以加算方式堆叠）^火焰 - 所有当前刷新的敌人移动速度降低 50%，造成的伤害降低 50%（以乘算方式堆叠）^宝石 - 你接下来迎战的 X 个首领的最大生命值减少 50%（X = 卡牌数）
Additively increases the odds of Knight cards being drawn by 20% (additively reducing the odds of each other card by 5%)
使骑士牌被抽到的概率提高 20%，以加算方式堆叠（使所有其他牌被抽到的概率降低 5%，以加算方式堆叠）

specializationDescription.original: Ellywick focuses on supporting her allies by increasing the odds of drawing Knight cards from her Deck of Many Things.
specializationDescription.display: 艾利薇通过提高她从她的万象无常牌中抽到骑士牌的概率来专注于支援她的盟友。

description.desc: Additively increases the odds of Moon cards being drawn by 20% (additively reducing the odds of each other card by 5%)
使月亮牌被抽到的概率提高 20%，以加算方式堆叠（使所有其他牌被抽到的概率降低 5%，以加算方式堆叠）

specializationDescription.original: Ellywick focuses on her Gold Find abilities by increasing the odds of drawing Moon cards from her Deck of Many Things.
specializationDescription.display: 艾利薇通过提高她从她的万象无常牌中抽到月亮牌的概率来专注于她的金币寻获技能。

description.desc: Additively increases the odds of Gem cards being drawn by 20% (additively reducing the odds of each other card by 5%)
使宝石牌被抽到的概率提高 20%，以加算方式堆叠（使所有其他牌被抽到的概率降低 5%，以加算方式堆叠）

specializationDescription.original: Ellywick focuses on acquiring Gems by increasing the odds of drawing Gem cards from her Deck of Many Things.
specializationDescription.display: 艾利薇通过提高她从她的万象无常牌中抽到宝石牌的概率来专注于获取宝石。

description.desc: Ellywick counts the total number of cards she has drawn in the adventure. She increases the effect of Powerful Following by 3% for each card she has drawn, stacking multiplicatively and capping at 1,000 cards.
艾利薇会计算她在冒险中抽取的卡牌总数。她每抽取一张卡牌，她就使“强力追随者”的效果增加 3%，以乘算方式堆叠，上限为 1000 张卡牌。

description.original: The kids are more important than this. Let's go.
description.display: 那些孩子比这件事更重要。出发吧。

description.original: Welcome to the Feywild!
description.display: 欢迎来到妖精荒野！

description.original: Not every carnival stop is Waterdeep.
description.display: 不是每个嘉年华都会在深水城逗留的。

description.original: It was good that you found me, Champions.
description.display: 你们找到我是好事，勇士们。

description.original: Feywild companions, to me!
description.display: 妖精荒野的勇士们，到我身边来！

description.original: Don't worry, I have a few friends at the carnival that can help us out.
description.display: 不用担心，我在嘉年华上有几个朋友能帮忙。

description.original: It's the music that drives me, and makes everything AWESOME.
description.display: 它的音乐让我迷醉，显得一切都很棒。

description.original: Find a gold piece pick it up...
description.display: 找到金子捡起来......

description.original: Sometimes I think the cards have a mind of their own...
description.display: 有时候我觉得卡牌是有自己的思想的……

effects.description: Increases the effect of $source's The Deck of Many Things ability by $amount%

description.original: Asteria looked fate in the eyes and chose to rewrite her story.
description.display: 星夜女神直视命运，选择改写她的故事。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 50% and prevents roaming familiars from automatically activating Ellywick's ultimate attack.

description.original: This is the greatest and best song in the multiverse...
description.display: 这是多元宇宙中最伟大最优美的乐曲……

description.original: Your good deeds shall be rewarded.
description.display: 你的善举将得到奖赏。

effects.description: Ellywick stacks the deck to always draw a Knight card, unless she already has one in her hand

description.original: Beware the wrath of the Moonstalkers.
description.display: 当心月行者的愤怒。

effects.description: Ellywick stacks the deck to always draw a Moon card, unless she already has one in her hand

description.original: Whatever the consequences, it's not clear you made the right choice.
description.display: 无论后果如何，你做出的选择是否正确还不明确。

effects.description: Ellywick stacks the deck to always draw a Fates card, unless she already has one in her hand

description.original: Spread the wealth.
description.display: 均贫富。

effects.description: Ellywick stacks the deck to always draw a Gem card, unless she already has one in her hand

description.original: The deck was made because of love and bravery. Always remember that.
description.display: 这副牌组是因为爱和勇气而制作的。永远要记住这点。

effects.description: Decreases the requirements to draw a new card by 40%

description.original: I built it for Jenks to start playing. It looks just like my old lute!
description.display: 我做它是为了让詹克斯学习演奏。它跟我的旧鲁特琴看起来一个样！

description.original: I still have the original stored away.
description.display: 最老的那一架我还藏着呢。

description.original: It was gifted to me by two queens of the Feywild.
description.display: 这是妖精荒野的两位女王赐给我的礼物。

description.original: Please ask Deekin not to touch it.
description.display: 请叫德金不要碰它。

description.original: It's a prop from the Witchlight Carnival.
description.display: 这是女巫之光嘉年华上的道具。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $source's The Deck of Many Things ability by $amount%

description.original: It gets the point across.
description.display: 它能把问题讲清楚。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $source's The Deck of Many Things ability by $amount%

description.original: It sings as it slices through the air.
description.display: 它划破空气时会发出吟唱。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $source's The Deck of Many Things ability by $amount%

description.original: It came from another plane, but I'm not ready to talk about that yet.
description.display: 它来自另一个位面，但我还不想谈这个话题。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $source's The Deck of Many Things ability by $amount%

description.original: Trust me, it's unlucky.
description.display: 相信我，真的很不走运。

description.original: The Deck of Many Things is a dangerous game to play. I got lucky.
description.display: 万象无常牌是一个危险的游戏。但我走运了。

description.original: More friends to help restore the forest!
description.display: 又多了一群帮忙治愈森林的朋友！

description.original: I topdecked my wish! Now everybody knows my music!
description.display: 我的梦想实现了！现在所有人都知道我的音乐了！

description.original: For use when it's time to run.
description.display: 仅供逃跑的时候使用。

description.original: Have you ever been to Ravnica?
description.display: 你去过拉夫尼卡吗？

description.original: A gift from a dear friend.
description.display: 一位亲密朋友送的礼物。

description.original: For the next time the Summer Queen calls.
description.display: 为下次夏日女王召见时准备的。

description.original: It hangs out under my collar.
description.display: 它就挂在我的衣领下面。

description.original: We've had quite an adventure together!
description.display: 我们一起经历过很精彩的冒险！

description.original: He's rather chatty!
description.display: 他的话有点多！

description.original: Talking with her... always makes me... sleepy.
description.display: 跟她说话......总是让我......昏昏入睡。

description.original: Anyone have the munchies?
description.display: 有人有点心吗？

description.original: Want to try it out, Hew Maan?
description.display: 想试试吗，休马恩？

description.original: I keep this to remind me that there is still beauty in the multiverse.
description.display: 我留着这个是为了提醒自己，多元宇宙中美仍然是存在的。

description.original: The rot grows.
description.display: 腐烂会慢慢扩散。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Gnome Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Magic Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Ellywick Tumblestrum has created music of such stirring quality that she was once invited to the Feywild where she played for the Summer Queen and the Queen of Air and Darkness. So moved were the two queens that they gifted the bard with her instrument, Morningmist. Tumblestrum's affinity for the Feywild brought her and her frog companion, Groak, to the Witchlight Carnival, where she spins tales and sings songs about the Plane of Faerie.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Ellywick provides a variety of support buffed by random draws from the Deck of Many Things

event_upgrades.name: Powerful Following
event_upgrades.description: Ellywick buffs the damage of Champions in the column behind them, this buff is increased by their Knight stacks.

display.description: 最老的那一架我还藏着呢。

original.name: Morningmist
original.description: It was gifted to me by two queens of the Feywild.

display.name: 晨雾
display.description: 这是妖精荒野的两位女王赐给我的礼物。

original.name: Otherworldly Lute
original.description: Please ask Deekin not to touch it.

display.name: 超凡鲁特琴
display.description: 请叫德金不要碰它。

original.name: Simple Blade
original.description: It's a prop from the Witchlight Carnival.

original.name: Shortsword
original.description: It gets the point across.

display.description: 它划破空气时会发出吟唱。

original.name: Feywild Blade
original.description: It came from another plane, but I'm not ready to talk about that yet.

effects.description: Increases the effect of $source's The Deck of Many Things ability by $amount%

display.name: 妖精荒野之刃
display.description: 它来自另一个位面，但我还不想谈这个话题。

original.name: Unlucky Draw
original.description: Trust me, it's unlucky.

display.name: 不幸之卡
display.description: 相信我，真的很不走运。

original.name: The Fates Card
original.description: The Deck of Many Things is a dangerous game to play. I got lucky.

display.name: 命运之卡
display.description: 万象无常牌是一个危险的游戏。但我走运了。

original.name: Knight Card
original.description: More friends to help restore the forest!

display.name: 骑士牌
display.description: 又多了一群帮忙治愈森林的朋友！

original.name: Moon Card
original.description: I topdecked my wish! Now everybody knows my music!

display.name: 月亮牌
display.description: 我的梦想实现了！现在所有人都知道我的音乐了！

original.name: Exit Jacket
original.description: For use when it's time to run.

display.name: 逃脱外套
display.description: 仅供逃跑的时候使用。

original.name: Stealthy Coat
original.description: Have you ever been to Ravnica?

display.name: 潜行外衣
display.description: 你去过拉夫尼卡吗？

original.name: Feywild Coat
original.description: A gift from a dear friend.

display.name: 妖精荒野外衣
display.description: 一位亲密朋友送的礼物。

original.name: Tumblestrum's Fancy Coat
original.description: For the next time the Summer Queen calls.

display.name: 乱弦的华丽外衣
display.description: 为下次夏日女王召见时准备的。

original.name: Honeybee Companion
original.description: It hangs out under my collar.

display.name: 蜜蜂伙伴
display.description: 它就挂在我的衣领下面。

original.name: Buzzer the Bee
original.description: We've had quite an adventure together!

display.name: 蜜蜂嗡嗡
display.description: 我们一起经历过很精彩的冒险！

original.name: Red the Squirrel
original.description: He's rather chatty!

display.name: 松鼠红红
display.description: 他的话有点多！

original.name: Starlight the Pixie
original.description: Talking with her... always makes me... sleepy.

display.name: 皮克精星光
display.description: 跟她说话......总是让我......昏昏入睡。

original.name: Snack Pack
original.description: Anyone have the munchies?

display.name: 零食背包
display.description: 有人有点心吗？

original.name: Make Your Own Treant Kit
original.description: Want to try it out, Hew Maan?

display.name: 假扮树人套装
display.description: 想试试吗，休马恩？

original.name: Floating Flower
original.description: I keep this to remind me that there is still beauty in the multiverse.

display.name: 漂浮的花
display.description: 我留着这个是为了提醒自己，多元宇宙中美仍然是存在的。

original.name: Collection from Thither
original.description: The rot grows.

display.name: 来自彼方的收藏
display.description: 腐烂会慢慢扩散。
